reproductive-rights.summary: Supports abortion access and has voted against federal restrictions on the procedure.

lgbtq-rights.summary: Voted for the Respect for Marriage Act and supports anti-discrimination protections.

drug-policy.summary: Supports marijuana decriminalization and has backed cannabis banking legislation.

voting-rights.summary: Supported the Freedom to Vote Act and advocates for ranked-choice voting reforms.

taxes-and-spending.summary: Generally favors targeted tax increases on high earners while supporting fiscal responsibility.

labor-and-unions.summary: Supports collective bargaining rights and voted for the PRO Act.

privacy-and-surveillance.summary: Advocates for stronger data privacy protections and has pushed for surveillance reform.

trade-and-tariffs.summary: Generally favors free trade but supports protections for Maine industries like fishing and forestry.

reproductive-rights.summary: Identifies as pro-choice but voted to confirm justices who overturned Roe and opposed codification bills.

lgbtq-rights.summary: Voted for the Respect for Marriage Act and supports workplace anti-discrimination protections.

drug-policy.summary: Opposes recreational marijuana legalization but supports medical cannabis and some sentencing reforms.

voting-rights.summary: Supported the Electoral Count Reform Act but opposed broader Democratic voting rights bills.

labor-and-unions.summary: Has occasionally supported union-friendly measures but generally sides with business interests.

privacy-and-surveillance.summary: Co-authored consumer privacy legislation and supports reforms to government surveillance programs.

trade-and-tariffs.summary: Favors free trade agreements and has criticized broad tariffs as harmful to Maine businesses.

reproductive-rights.summary: Strongly supports abortion rights and has shared his own family's experience to advocate for access.

lgbtq-rights.summary: Co-sponsored the Equality Act and voted for the Respect for Marriage Act.

trade-and-tariffs.summary: Supports trade enforcement to protect Michigan manufacturing while backing some free trade measures.
